zh.Aldington, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特阿爾迪頓
zh.East Peckham, Kent, England: 英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Cromer於大約1470年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Sir James Cromer31歲，母親Catherine Cantelowe32歲。她於大約1489年與William Whetenhall III在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆享年51歲。

zh-hans.Aldington, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特阿爾迪頓
zh-hans.East Peckham, Kent, England: 英国肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Cromer于大约1470年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Sir James Cromer31岁，母亲Catherine Cantelowe32岁。她于大约1489年与William Whetenhall III在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cromer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Kromer and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Cromer, which is very rare in Germany, is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare 2 below.
French: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hrodmar, composed of the elements hrōd ‘renown, glory’ + mār ‘famous’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Kromer
meanings: German (also Krömer): occupational name for a small retailer, a variant of Krämer (see Kramer ). Compare Kroemer .
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): occupational name for a small retailer, from Yiddish krom ‘small shop’ (compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Cromer was born about 1470, in Kent, England, her father, Sir James Cromer, was 31 and her mother, Catherine Cantelowe, was 32. She married William Whetenhall III about 1489, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1520, in East Peckham, Kent, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Cromer est née environ 1470, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Cromer, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Catherine Cantelowe, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Whetenhall III environ 1489, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1520, à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Cromer um 1470 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir James Cromer 31 und ihre Mutter Catherine Cantelowe 32. Sie hat um 1489 in England William Whetenhall III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 51 Jahren in East Peckham, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Cromer è nata il circa 1470 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Sir James Cromer, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Catherine Cantelowe, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William Whetenhall III circa 1489, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1520, nel East Peckham, Kent, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Tunstall, Kent, England: イギリスケントトゥンスタル
ja.Aldington, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントアルディントン
ja.East Peckham, Kent, England: イギリスケントエアスト ペックハム
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Cromerが約1470年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir James Cromerは31歳，母Catherine Canteloweは32歳であった。約1489年にイギリスでWilliam Whetenhall IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Cromer(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Cromer(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Cantelowe(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1489년 영국에서 William Whetenhall III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aldington, Kent, England: Aldington, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Cromer nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir James Cromer, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Cantelowe, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William Whetenhall III aproximadamente 1489, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1520, em East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Cromer родилась около 1470 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir James Cromer было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Cantelowe, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Whetenhall III около 1489 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Cromer nació aproximadamente 1470, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir James Cromer, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Catherine Cantelowe, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William Whetenhall III aproximadamente 1489, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1520, en East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
